extraction.one_line_summary: CAIMAN Lennard won from breakaway at Villard-de-Lans after ALAPHILIPPE cracked on final climb despite family history at venue.
tactical_patterns: TRENTIN attacked intermediate sprint climb early, exposing BENNETT/SAGAN absence from front split for critical 20 green jersey points.
UAE acceleration mid-final climb temporarily isolated ROGLIC from JUMBO support before team regained control, revealing defensive weakness.
LOPEZ attacked final 200m not for stage but targeting URAN's 11-second third place cushion through bonus seconds.

rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: Aggressively contested sprint points on categorized climb despite not being pure sprinter, closing to 15 points of SAGAN
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Failed to make split over category 4 climb before intermediate sprint, tactical error after correctly marking SAGAN at start
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Cracked badly on final climb at Villard-de-Lans where his father won yellow in 1987, psychological pressure possible
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Cracked again on final climb, losing top-10 position to DUMOULIN who was also struggling, career decline evident
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: neutral: Suffered on final climb but still gained position over QUINTANA, barely holding on
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: Tactically astute late attack targeting 11-second gap to URAN for podium, not stage hunting
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Attacked before finish despite no GC gain possible, showing relentless aggression even when tactically unnecessary
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: Momentarily isolated when UAE accelerated but JUMBO regained control, defensive rather than dominant
